event: Female figure chained to a rock
description: A painting of a nude female figure chained by the wrists to a large dark rock. She stands with her arms raised above her head, her body arching slightly. Her long auburn hair flows down her back and over her shoulders. Below her feet, white foamy waves or mist swirl around the base of the rock. The background is dark and moody with muted browns and grays. Her expression conveys distress or anguish as she looks upward. The painting has a soft, tonal quality characteristic of academic studies.
